name: Olive Garden Chicken Marsala
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken half-breasts (skinless/boneless, pounded to 1/4 inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, and oregano in a shallow dish; blend well.
2. Heat the oil and butter in a skillet until bubbling lightly.
3. Dredge each chicken piece in the seasoned flour, shaking off excess.
4. Cook the chicken on medium heat for about 2 minutes on the first side,
until lightly browned.
5. As you turn the chicken to the second side, add the mushrooms around
the pieces.
6. Cook the chicken on medium heat for about 2 more minutes on the
second side, until lightly browned.
7. Stir the mushrooms and add the wine around the pieces.
8. Cover the pan and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Source: The Olive Garden.
